positive: Stylized whimsical scene featuring a bioluminescent forest at twilight. The foreground shows several delicate, silhouetted geometric mushrooms glowing with soft, cyan and emerald light. Hanging vines and abstract floral motifs interweave, forming elegant, high-contrast patterns against a deep indigo and midnight blue background. Composition is symmetrical, centered around a single, stylized river flow. Art style: Art Deco meets Naturecore, highly detailed ink illustration aesthetic, vibrant jewel tones, clean vector lines, perfect for repeat pattern design. Minimalist negative space, ultra-high resolution, flat lay look, perfect symmetry.
